mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.VER, A.APLC_DE, A.REPRSNT_AT, A.USE_AT FROM TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY A WHERE A.REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' AND COALESCE(A.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY A.APLC_DE DESC, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID DESC ) Z WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY WHERE 1=1
AND #{searchCondition} '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY SET INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM = #{indvdlInfoNm}, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN = #{indvdlInfoDc}, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT = #{indvdlInfoYn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, VER = #{ver}, APLC_DE = #{aplcDe}, REPRSNT_AT = #{reprsntAt} WHERE INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID=#{indvdlInfoId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT, A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.VER, A.APLC_DE, A.REPRSNT_AT, A.USE_AT FROM TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY A WHERE 1=1 AND A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID=#{indvdlInfoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY ( INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT, USE_AT )VALUES( #{indvdlInfoId}, #{indvdlInfoNm}, #{indvdlInfoDc}, #{indvdlInfoYn}, SYSDATETIME, #{frstRegisterId}, SYSDATETIME, #{lastUpdusrId}, #{ver}, #{aplcDe}, #{reprsntAt}, COALESCE(#{useAt}, 'Y') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY SET REPRSNT_AT = 'N' WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY SET REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' WHERE INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID = #{indvdlInfoId}
UPDATE TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY SET USE_AT = #{useAt}, REPRSNT_AT = CASE WHEN #{useAt} = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE REPRSNT_AT END, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATETIME WHERE INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID = #{indvdlInfoId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_INDVDL_INFO_POLICY WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y'
